item.title: About me
item.description: I am working toward the PhD degree in the College of Intelligence and Computing, Tianjin University, China. I received the BS and MS degree in Electronic & Information Engineering, Suzhou University of Science and Technology, China, in 2015 and 2018. My research interests include lifelong learning, vision-language understanding, low-shot learning, etc.

item.title: Education
item.description: [2011.9 - 2015.6]: B.S. Suzhou University of Science and Technology, Electronic & Information Engineering [2015.9 - 2018.9]: M.S. Suzhou University of Science and Technology, Electronic & Information Engineering [2018.9 - present]: Ph.D. Tianjin University, College of Intelligence and Computing

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2020 Deng C, Wu Q, Wu Q, Lyu F, et al. Visual Grounding via Accumulated Attention[J]. IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2020 (Early Access). Wang S, Lyu F, et al. MutAtt: Visual-Textual Mutual Guidance For Referring Expression Comprehension[C]//2020 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME). IEEE, 2020: 1-6. Li Z, Lyu F, et al. Modeling Cross-View Interaction Consistency for Paired Egocentric Interaction Recognition[C]//2020 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME).
